message:
fix(sync,trace): Fix race condition in Notify and version handling in integrity

notify.rs:
- Fix race condition where entry could be popped by another task's
  cleanup before owner polls, causing waiter to wait forever
- If entry is missing (index >= len), treat as notified since the only
  way entry gets popped is if waker was taken by notify_one/notify_waiters

integrity.rs:
- Only read compression byte for version 2+ files in verify_header
- Version 1 trace files don't have compression byte field

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
